resources.string: Persistent notification to quickly switch the active input method.

Neo2 external keyboard layout for physical keyboards.\n\nTo use it: enable the input method and select it as the current keyboard. A notification helps you switch quickly between input methods e.g. when a Bluetooth Keyboard connects but the Neo2 IME is not yet selected.
✗ Bluetooth permission missing (required to detect connecting keyboards)
✗ Notification permission missing (required for the IME switcher notification)
